line_1: Beat on the Deep, and bubble up the Brine.
line_2: Collected Show'rs their falling Forces joyn,

line_1: Lightens the long track of the gleamy brine!
line_2: That towered the leader of the hostile line!

line_1: Then, mutt'ring o'er the deep, buffets th' unruly brine,
line_2: 'Till clouds and water seem to join.

line_1: — Stretch'd on one bier they sleep beneath the brine,
line_2: And their white bones with ivory arms intwine!

line_1: Till blue and level heaves the silent brine,
line_2: And the new-lighted rocks at distance shine;

line_1: Sunk fathoms deep beneath the rolling brine,
line_2: Or think on those who, in yon dreary mine,

line_1: The tall ship moves not on the tranquil brine;
